segments.text: Normal mints are 10 to 20 rupees but this one cost 150 rupees. The secret is in the packaging. This is impact mints.
The market was full of cheap option. So they took this challenge to create something premium out of mints. But to sell premium the packaging has to match.
You know almost all mints come in cheap plastic boxes that you always throw away. So Impact mints designed a sleek durable metal box something that you would want to keep like an accessory.
Now people have a cool reusable metal box but this created a new problem. Why would anybody wants to buy a second one?
So, they launched a huge variety of colors and limited editions, turning a one-time purchase into a collection. But here's the real genius part. They did
not spend crass TV advertisements or celebrity endorsements. Their packaging itself became the marketing. People showed off their colorful metal boxes
and the product sold itself. Amazing stuff. Subscribe for more.
